column3: Status: PENDING / EM2_SENT / EM3_SENT / LIVE / NO_RESPONSE

column1: Add `?ref=bytes` (or newsletter name) to all links in outreach emails.
Then check in Google Analytics: Acquisition → Source/Medium → referral = newsletter name.
- **NO_RESPONSE** — All 3 emails sent, no response. Archive and move on.
- **NOT_FIT** — Polite decline. Thank them and move on.
